portal: dublincity.ie (adopted plan HTML); consult.dublincity.ie hosted the draft
fetch_method: curl.exe of adopted plan chapter index + 6 sub-section HTML pages (158, 1511, 159, 1516, 153, 155); tag-stripped and extracted. WebFetch was 403-blocked on dublincity.ie.
notes: Chapter 15 states residential open-space (10%/25%), private open space (10 sqm/bedspace), apartment floor areas (37/45/73/90 sqm), unit mix, childcare (1 facility per 75 dwellings), play-space sizes, separation (~22m), and EIA/AA/EcIA triggers inline. Density, building height, plot ratio, site coverage are DEFERRED to Appendix 3; car/cycle parking, road widths and traffic-assessment thresholds DEFERRED to Appendix 5 (not captured here). raw/dm_standards.html is the chapter index page; the substantive standards live on the sub-section pages which were fetched into c:/tmp during extraction.
